intro: Oxydectes helicoidea, commonly known as helicoides, is a plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae. Helicoides has been traditionally used in medicine for its health benefits, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can aid in wound healing and reducing pain and inflammation. The plant contains bioactive constituents such as flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
